name: Herman Miller Aeron Chair
introText: The Herman Miller Aeron is the most iconic ergonomic office chair ever made — the industry benchmark for lumbar support, adjustability, and build quality since 1994, available in Canada for $1,795 CAD.
whatWorks: PostureFit SL lumbar system supports the sacrum AND the lower back independently — unlike single-pivot lumbar supports, the dual-pivot design mirrors the natural S-curve of the spine, preventing the back from rounding during long sessions.
8Z Pellicle mesh distributes pressure across the entire back and seat — no hotspots, no sagging over time; the mesh breathes and maintains its shape for the 12-year warranty period.
worthKnowing: Three size options (A, B, C) based on body size — the wrong size Aeron is uncomfortable. Measure and verify your size before purchasing; most users fit Size B.
Best value when bought refurbished — Herman Miller certified refurbished Aerons cost 40–60% less with the same warranty coverage. Check Herman Miller's certified refurbished program.

commonComplaints.title: Expensive — even for its quality
commonComplaints.body: At $1,795 CAD, the Aeron is an investment. Refurbished units or the Steelcase Leap V2 are often recommended as alternatives at lower cost.

commonComplaints.title: Hard seat edge can cause leg numbness
commonComplaints.body: The Aeron's waterfall seat edge can cause circulation issues for shorter users with thighs that don't reach the front properly. Size A is better for users under 5'4".

commonComplaints.title: Mesh back can feel firm initially
commonComplaints.body: New Aeron mesh feels firmer than foam alternatives. A 2–3 week break-in period is normal before the mesh conforms to your back shape.

verdict: The Herman Miller Aeron is the best office chair for all-day sitting — the PostureFit SL lumbar, 8Z Pellicle mesh, and 12-year warranty justify the premium for professionals who sit 8+ hours daily. Back pain prevention is worth the investment. Buy refurbished to reduce cost.

realBuyers.quote: Back pain gone after switching from my $400 chair. I was skeptical of the price. Bought one used. Best purchase I've ever made.
12-year warranty isn't marketing — they replaced a broken arm 9 years in. No questions asked.
The lumbar support is different from every other chair. It actually follows your spine when you lean back.

sources.title: Herman Miller Aeron — Herman Miller Canada

metaDescription: Herman Miller Aeron Chair review Canada: PostureFit SL, 8Z Pellicle mesh, 12-year warranty. $1,795 CAD. Best ergonomic office chair for Canadian professionals.
